# Macroshifts

> Macroshifts is a venture studio that takes founders from idea to funded company — strategy, product engineering, managed IT, SEO, and warm investor introductions, all under one roof.

Macroshifts ("from idea to enterprise") works with two kinds of clients: new founders who need an idea turned into a real, fundable business, and established businesses that need to modernise and grow. The same in-house team handles strategy, product engineering, operations, growth, and investor introductions — no hand-offs. Senior engineers do the build; engagements can be fee, equity, or a blend. Contact: hello@macroshifts.com.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://macroshifts.com/): Venture studio that turns founders' ideas into funded companies.
- [Services](https://macroshifts.com/Services): Websites & apps, product & tech strategy, managed IT & support, and SEO & digital growth.
- [About](https://macroshifts.com/About): The studio behind the work — senior-only engineering, founder-friendly terms, 40+ portfolio startups.
- [Contact](https://macroshifts.com/Contact): Pitch an idea or book a call; reply within one business day.
- [Careers](https://macroshifts.com/Careers): Remote roles across engineering, design, SEO, content, and operations.
- [Newsletter](https://macroshifts.com/Newsletter): Field notes from the studio on building and funding companies.
- [Compliance](https://macroshifts.com/Compliance): Terms of service, privacy policy, and compliance details.

## Solutions
- [Startups](https://macroshifts.com/solutions/startups): From idea to first paying customer.
- [Local Business](https://macroshifts.com/solutions/local-business): Win in your local market.
- [Enterprises](https://macroshifts.com/solutions/enterprises): Transform legacy operations.
- [Solo Founders](https://macroshifts.com/solutions/solo-founders): Ship without a co-founder.
- [Ecommerce](https://macroshifts.com/solutions/ecommerce): DTC, marketplace, and subscription growth.

## Guides
- [MVP Development Cost in 2026](https://macroshifts.com/articles/mvp-development-cost-2026): What actually drives the cost of building an MVP in 2026.
- [SEO for SaaS Startups in 2026](https://macroshifts.com/articles/seo-saas-startups-2026): How early-stage SaaS companies should approach search.
- [Validate a SaaS Idea in 14 Days](https://macroshifts.com/articles/validate-saas-idea-14-days): A two-week framework for testing demand before building.
- [SOC 2 Compliance Startup Guide](https://macroshifts.com/articles/soc2-compliance-startup-guide): What SOC 2 means for early-stage startups and how to prepare.
- [Pre-seed Pitch Deck Template](https://macroshifts.com/articles/preseed-pitch-deck-template): The slides investors expect in a pre-seed raise.

## Facts
- Studio model: idea validation, product build, managed operations, and investor introductions in-house.
- Track record: 120+ products shipped, 40+ startups in the portfolio, customers across 50+ countries, 9+ years operating.
- Engagement terms: fee, equity, or a blend, structured for early-stage founders.
- Contact: hello@macroshifts.com · https://macroshifts.com
